name: Ana García
summary: Backend developer with 5 years of experience in Python and FastAPI. Expert in REST architectures and PostgreSQL databases. Passionate about clean code and performance.

experience.description: Built and maintained payment processing microservices in Python and FastAPI. Reduced API latency by 40% through query optimization and caching strategies.
Developed RESTful APIs and integrated third-party financial services. Worked with PostgreSQL and Redis in a high-availability environment.

name: Carlos López
summary: Fullstack engineer with experience in React and Node.js. Has led teams of 4 people and has a background in e-commerce and SaaS platforms.

experience.description: Led a team of 4 engineers building HR SaaS features with React and Node.js. Drove architecture decisions and code review culture.
Developed internal tools and customer-facing features for the e-commerce platform. Worked with React, Express.js, and PostgreSQL.

name: María Fernández
summary: Data scientist with 4 years of experience in machine learning and Python. Skilled in scikit-learn, pandas, and building predictive models for retail analytics.

experience.description: Built demand forecasting models using scikit-learn and XGBoost, reducing stock-outs by 18%. Developed automated data pipelines with pandas and Airflow.
Analysed retail client data and created dashboards in Power BI and Python. Supported ML model deployment in Azure.

name: Javier Torres
summary: DevOps engineer specialized in Kubernetes and CI/CD pipelines. Has managed cloud infrastructure on AWS for high-traffic applications and is proficient in Terraform.

experience.description: Managed Kubernetes clusters on AWS EKS for banking applications serving millions of users. Designed GitOps-based CI/CD pipelines with ArgoCD and GitHub Actions.
Maintained on-premises Linux infrastructure and migrated legacy services to AWS. Automated provisioning with Terraform and Ansible.

name: Laura Sánchez
summary: Frontend developer with 3 years of experience building responsive UIs with React and TypeScript. Passionate about accessibility and design systems.

experience.description: Built and maintained the design system in React and TypeScript used across 6 product teams. Improved WCAG 2.1 AA compliance across the main web app.
Developed landing pages and web apps for small businesses using React, Next.js, and Tailwind CSS.

name: Andrés Martínez
summary: Mobile developer with expertise in React Native and Flutter. Has shipped apps with over 100k downloads on both iOS and Android platforms.

experience.description: Developed and shipped a React Native restaurant management app (100k+ downloads). Integrated push notifications, offline sync, and Stripe payments.
Built Flutter apps for banking clients on iOS and Android. Implemented biometric authentication and BLE integrations.

name: Sofía Ruiz
summary: Data engineer with experience building ETL pipelines using Apache Spark and Airflow. Has worked in the healthcare sector processing large volumes of structured and unstructured data.

experience.description: Designed and maintained ETL pipelines processing 50M+ daily health records using Spark and Airflow on Azure Databricks.
Built data integration workflows for public sector clients using Talend and SQL Server. Migrated legacy batch jobs to Apache Kafka streaming.

certifications.name: Databricks Certified Associate Developer for Apache Spark
Microsoft Certified: Azure Data Engineer Associate

name: Diego Herrera
summary: Backend developer specializing in Java and Spring Boot. Has 6 years of experience building microservices for banking and insurance companies.

experience.description: Led migration of monolithic insurance platform to Spring Boot microservices. Introduced event-driven architecture using Apache Kafka.
Developed core banking APIs in Java and Spring Boot. Worked with Oracle DB and implemented OAuth2 security flows.

certifications.name: Oracle Certified Professional: Java SE 17 Developer

name: Valentina Gómez
summary: Full-stack developer with strong skills in Vue.js and Django. Has worked on government digital transformation projects and is experienced with Docker and Linux environments.

experience.description: Built citizen-facing digital services using Vue.js and Django REST Framework. Containerised services with Docker and deployed on OpenShift.
Developed web applications for public sector clients using Django and jQuery. Managed Linux servers and PostgreSQL databases.

name: Mateo Jiménez
summary: Cloud architect with certifications in AWS and GCP. Has designed multi-region architectures for SaaS startups and is experienced in cost optimization and security best practices.

experience.description: Designed multi-region AWS architecture supporting 99.99% uptime SLA. Led cloud cost optimization initiative that saved $300k/year. Defined security baseline for SOC 2 compliance.
Migrated on-premises workloads to AWS and GCP. Implemented infrastructure-as-code with Terraform and built monitoring stacks with Prometheus and Grafana.

name: Isabella Morales
summary: Machine learning engineer focused on NLP and LLMs. Has fine-tuned transformer models and deployed inference APIs using FastAPI and Hugging Face on production systems.

experience.description: Fine-tuned BERT and LLaMA models for financial document classification. Deployed inference APIs with FastAPI on AWS SageMaker, serving 10M+ requests/month.
Contributed to multilingual NLP research using Hugging Face Transformers. Ran large-scale training jobs on HPC clusters with SLURM.

name: Tomás Castillo
summary: QA engineer with 5 years of experience in test automation using Selenium, Pytest, and Cypress. Has implemented end-to-end testing frameworks for agile teams in telecommunications.

experience.description: Built end-to-end test suites in Cypress and Pytest for telecom billing systems. Integrated automated tests into CI/CD pipelines reducing release cycle from 2 weeks to 3 days.
Designed automated regression tests with Selenium and Java for CRM platforms. Coordinated UAT with business stakeholders.

certifications.name: ISTQB Certified Tester – Advanced Level Test Automation Engineer
